name: Sama Resources Inc.
description: Sama Resources Inc. is a Canadian-based, growth-oriented resource company focused on the exploration and development of mineral properties in West Africa. The company primarily targets nickel, copper, cobalt, and platinum group elements (PGEs), with its flagship Samapleu-Grata project located in Côte d’Ivoire. Managed by experienced industry professionals, Sama Resources is committed to discovering and exploiting high-potential deposits. The company also maintains exploration interests in Liberia and is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol SME, reflecting its strategic focus on advancing large-scale mining projects in underexplored geological regions.
